## Motivation

Why is this change needed? Link any related issues.

Closes #

- Mention any breaking changes here

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes

- [ ] Updated the README if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Added a new section to docs if a new adapter or target was introduced
